title: Automation Issues Post Migration to Work Management

posts.author: ajhale21 (Amie Hale)
posts.cookedHtml:
We recently moved our Workspaces and Boards from Monday Projects to Monday Work Management. One of the six automations associated to a board is failing. The activity log associated with it indicates the selected workspace no longer exists. When I attempt to click on the link in the error, Monday launches a page that never completely loads (it shows the Monday logo but the page stays white). Could anyone provide tips on how to resolve this? All of the other automations related to the boards in the workspace are working fine.
